name: interior_passage_v2_p2
description: Pass 2: Photographic refinement for interior passages. Polish materials, lighting, color richness.
pass_purpose: Enhance material richness, color depth, lighting realism without changing geometry

prompt_templates.positive: photorealistic architectural photography, rich limestone texture, subtle color variation in stone, natural daylight with realistic shadows and highlights, documentary style, high detail, authentic materials, professional camera
prompt_templates.negative: drawing, sketch, monochrome, flat lighting, plastic, CGI, render, overexposed, washed out, distorted, blurry, low quality, text, watermark

expected_failure_modes: denoise > 0.20: May alter geometry from pass 1
Insufficient color in pass 1: Cannot recover monochrome
notes: Two-pass refinement. Only use if pass 1 is structurally correct but lacks material richness. Low denoise critical to preserve pass 1 geometry.
